languageStrings.LBL_STATUS_TRANSITIONS_HELP: Check the transitions that recruiters may perform manually (kanban drag-and-drop and Screening accept/reject). Unchecked pairs are blocked after you save.
languageStrings.LBL_RECRUITMENT_WORKFLOWS_HELP: Relation workflows that run when a candidate status changes in a project. Click a count to open linked workflows, or use + to add one for that transition.
languageStrings.LBL_SAVE_TRANSITIONS_FAILED: Could not save status transition rules.
languageStrings.LBL_TRANSITIONS_NOT_CONFIGURED: Transition rules are not active yet. The matrix below shows suggested defaults — review and click Save to enforce them.
languageStrings.LBL_TRANSITION_MAIL_HELP: For checked status transitions (kanban), after a successful status change the system sends or prompts for email using matching templates for the project's account. Add at least one template per enabled transition. Click the mode badge on each pill to toggle prompt (ask before send) or auto (send immediately).
languageStrings.LBL_NO_SHORT_NAMES: No recruitment email template short names defined yet. Add short names on ProjektyRekrutacyjne email templates first.
languageStrings.LBL_SAVE_TRANSITION_MAIL_TEMPLATES_REQUI: Each enabled transition must have at least one template selected.
languageStrings.LBL_SAVE_TRANSITION_MAIL_SHORT_NAMES_REQ: Each enabled transition must have at least one short name selected.

jsLanguageStrings.LBL_SAVE_TRANSITION_MAIL_SHORT_NAMES_REQ: Each enabled transition must have at least one short name selected.
